case_title: TOMAS TORRES VS. DOMUSTYLE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, TOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT DOMUSTYLE, INC. LUCA, GIANCARLO BONISOLI, ALESSANDRA ANTONELLA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
